SessionStart.command: bash -lc 'for root in "${COPILOT_PLUGIN_ROOT:-}" "$HOME/AppData/Roaming/Code/agentPlugins/github.com/github/copilot-plugins/plugins/copilot-starter"; do if [ -n "$root" ] && [ -f "$root/scripts/session-start.cjs" ]; then printf "%s" "$input" | node "$root/scripts/session-start.cjs"; exit $?; fi; done'
